title: Phase 7 — Hardening
description: Backpressure on outbox size, alerts on queue growth, replay/consistency checks, recovery/rollback runbook (optional/future). Source: Tasks.md Phase 7.

title: E2E validation
description: Confirm full path (Mac bridge → ingest → Postgres → analytics/MCP/web) in your environment with a test run. Source: Tasks.md Open / future.

title: Track new work in Linear
description: Migrate from Tasks.md checklist to Linear for new features and ops work; keep Tasks.md for completed migration only. Source: Tasks.md.

title: Outbox backpressure
description: Implement backpressure when outbox size exceeds a threshold so local trader does not unboundedly queue bridge payloads. Phase 7 / Current-State.

title: Alerts on queue growth
description: Add alerts or monitoring when bridge outbox/queue growth indicates backlog or ingest slowness. Phase 7 / Current-State.

title: Replay and consistency checks
description: Replay/consistency checks between local observability store and Railway Postgres (e.g. idempotency, gap detection). Phase 7 / Current-State.

title: Recovery and rollback runbook
description: Short runbook for recovery and rollback when bridge or ingest fails or data is inconsistent. Phase 7 / Current-State.

title: Integration/E2E tests vs Railway
description: Add integration or E2E tests against real Railway services (ingest, analytics); document how to run them. Current-State: not documented.
